summary: Automations Boards feature fully tested and verified. Backend APIs (POST/PUT/GET /api/automations) correctly handle 'boards' field - stores list of strings, updates correctly, returns in response. Frontend AutomationsModal shows multi-board selector at top of edit form with toggle buttons, selected boards highlighted with primary color, helper text shows 'aplica en TODOS' when none selected or count when some selected. List view shows 'Tableros' column with board badges or 'Todos'. Summary text includes board info.
features_tested: Backend: POST /api/automations accepts 'boards' field (list of strings) and stores it - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/automations/{id} updates the 'boards' field correctly - PASS
Backend: GET /api/automations returns 'boards' field for each automation - PASS
Backend: Empty boards array means automation applies to all boards - PASS
Backend: Backward compatibility - boards field is list, empty by default - PASS
Frontend: Automations modal shows multi-board selector at top of editing form - PASS
Frontend: All available boards shown as toggle buttons - PASS
Frontend: Selected boards highlighted with primary color - PASS
Frontend: Helper text shows 'aplica en TODOS' when none selected - PASS
Frontend: Helper text shows count when some boards selected - PASS
Frontend: Automations list view shows 'Tableros' column with board badges or 'Todos' - PASS
Frontend: Summary text includes board info when boards are selected - PASS
Frontend: Saving automation with selected boards persists correctly - PASS

issues: Hydration warnings in console (span inside tr/tbody) - cosmetic, does not affect functionality - existing issue from previous iterations

tests.test: Board scope section at top of edit form
tests.details: Label 'Tableros donde aplica esta regla' visible with orange border section
All boards (MASTER, SCHEDULING, BLANKS, SCREENS, etc.) shown as buttons
'Sin seleccion = aplica en TODOS los tableros' shown when no boards selected
'Activa en 1/2 tablero(s)' shown when boards selected
Column header 'Tableros' visible, board badges in orange for specific boards, 'Todos' for all boards
Automation saved and appears in list with correct board badges

critical_code_review_comments: AutomationCreate model correctly includes 'boards: Optional[List[str]] = []' field
Backend create_automation correctly stores boards field with default empty list
Backend update_automation uses model_dump() which includes boards field
Automation engine run_automations() correctly filters by order board - skips automation if auto_boards is not empty and order_board not in auto_boards
Frontend AutomationsModal correctly receives dynamicBoards prop from Dashboard
Frontend uses toggle buttons (not Select dropdown) for board selection - good UX
Board selection state managed correctly with array toggle logic
Helper text updates correctly based on selection state
Summary text correctly includes board info when boards are selected
seed_data_creation: Created admin test session via MongoDB for API and UI testing
